entry.title: Re: SAP Digital Manufacturing 25.02 Release enhancements and new capabilities

entry.title: Re: issue Inventory posting diapi
entry.content: Hi, we have the same issue. Could someone help us

entry.title: Vacation Post Challenge
entry.content:
Ready to take us on a journey? The Vacation Photo Challenge is officially on!

We’re inviting you to share a snapshot from one of your favorite vacations in the last five years—right here in this thread!
There’s just one important rule: it must be your own photo from a trip you personally took.

📸How to participate:

  • Post one vacation photo (only one entry per person).
  • Add one sentence about why you recommend this destination.

This will count as your final entry, so choose a memory that truly brings a smile!

How to vote:

  • Give kudos to your favorite photo posts—every like counts as a vote!

What’s in it for you?
All participants will receive a Community Challenge badge, and the winner will receive a special Community Challenge Winner badge.

Whether it’s a vibrant city, a tranquil nature escape, or a once-in-a-lifetime adventure—we’re excited to see the moments that left a mark on you.

🗓Submission period: June 12–26
Don’t wait—share your best vacation memory and let the journey begin!

entry.title: Re: How to deactivate notification for SAP GUI Scripting?
entry.content: Hello Thiago, thanks for you quick answer. We are using SAP GUI 32bit. I had set the REG_DWORD values for both Current_User & Local_Machine. As it didn't work I have removed the REG_DWORD values from Current_User.

entry.title: Re: How to add data (z table) in SAP Public cloud Customizing tenant?
entry.content: Perform some search on Custom Business Objects

entry.title: Re: How to use COOIS / COHV as a production cockpit
entry.content:
Thank you very much for this great piece of information, already rolled out to happy colleagues! 

We are however struggling at a seemingly easy detail: how to have the standard mass maintenance functions/pushbuttons visible by default? It's quite annoying and time consuming to always have to add them each time you run a new selection.

Adding transactions etc. all fine, but making e.g. the "TECO" button visible through the Navigation Profile, we could not achieve. How did you you do this in your screenshot? (yellow box)

entry.title: Re: edit a job history by import without inserting a new...
entry.content:
Hi @user116 

Recommended practise is download the existing job history date range report with mandated fields (effective start date, event reason, transaction sequence and User ID) and other required fields. 

Prepare job history upload file in csv format, in which do not change "effective start date" and "transaction sequence", so system will identify on which existing user record you are updating the change. Include the header and value for which you are replacing with new value. 

Try to validate the file, make sure maintain the proper effective start date, preceding cells which has "0" has to be in text format. If validation is successful then proceed with the import. 

Try to follow the above transaction in your test environment if the result is as per your expectation then proceed the same in production instance. 

 

Thanks 

Arun

entry.title: Re: Vacation Post Challenge
entry.content: Let me start by sharing my favorite island. I can’t recommend Ibiza enough—beautiful beaches, a stunning town, great restaurants, and wonderful people.

entry.title: Table IDPL_DP is not getting updated for Correction invoices
entry.content:
I’m facing an issue in the 100% down payment process for the Poland localization. The problem is that the IDPL_DP table is not being updated (the down payment entry is not removed) when a down payment correction is made.

 

As a result, even though the down payment correction has been posted, SAP still treats it as an open down payment when issuing the final invoice.

 

I found SAP Note 3018151 and followed the suggestion to remove the value in the Reference field, but it didn’t resolve the issue.

 

Does anyone have an idea of what else I can try?

entry.title: Re: 🧰👷‍♂️ The SAP S/4HANA RISE & SAP BTP - Toolbox 👷‍♂️🧰
entry.content:
This comment is a container for the SCM and TM Optimizer....

1262709 - RCCF: Information about reserving slots and destinations - SAP for Me

1223407 - Using the SCM Optimizer in virtual environments - SAP for Me

1577112 - SCM Optimizer: Sizing Information - SAP for Me

1326277 - Parallel processing PP/DS optimization - SAP for Me

1640509 - FAQ about the setup of SCM Optimizer - SAP for Me

1686826 - Installation help for installing SCM Optimizers - SAP for Me

1942641 - SCM Optimizer: Recommendations for installation and performance improvements of very short optimization runs - SAP for Me

1640509 - FAQ about the setup of SCM Optimizer - SAP for Me

2316960 - SCM Optimizer (14.0): Platform support / -recommendations & Roadmap - SAP for Me

entry.title: Dump CONVT_NO_NUMBER due to 3405744
entry.content:
Note 3405744 is implemented in the system. When an attempt is made to call up a document, the include LEINRF91 runs through.

The system dumps at position 154. " "P" cannot be interpreted as a number ".

The statement in 154 :

LOOP AT bet WHERE ebeln = pot-ebeln AND ebelp = pot-ebelp AND ( vgabe = 2 OR vgabe = 3 ). "^3405744

 

the entry of the parked document is selected with VGABE = P and leads to programme termination (because no number).

 

The following instruction would be better:

LOOP AT bet WHERE ebeln = pot-ebeln AND ebelp = pot-ebelp AND ( vgabe = "2" OR vgabe = "3" ). ---

entry.title: Re: Partial Usage Decision in Quality Management SAP Grow
entry.content:
Hello @sjsri ,

Thank you! 

Yes, SAP ECC and S/4HANA on-premises support partial result recording and usage decisions. Due to its simplified QM scope, this flexibility isn’t available in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud (GROW).

Best regards,
Chuma

entry.title: Re: Deploying a Fiori Adaption Project application to the...
entry.content:
Hello @Puffblende 

Thanks for sharing the context and screenshots. You’re on the right path. Deploying a Fiori Adaptation Project in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud can be tricky due to restrictions compared to on-premise.

 Problem

You've deployed an adaptation project via SAP Business Application Studio (BAS), but the app is not selectable in the “Manage Launchpad Space” app in Public Cloud.

 Root Cause

In S/4HANA Public Cloud, once a Fiori Adaptation Project is deployed

  • It must be assigned to a business catalogue and business role.
  • Only then will it appear in the Manage Launchpad Spaces/Pages app.

What To Do Next,

  1. Verify Deployment Was Successful
    • Open the “Maintain App Variants” app in your S/4HANA system.
    • Confirm your adapted app appears in the list with status Deployed.
  2. Assign to Business Catalogue
    • Use the “Maintain Business Catalogues” app (role required).
    • Add your adapted app to a business catalogue (can be custom).
    • Ensure this catalogue is assigned to a business role that’s assigned to your user.
  3. Manage Launchpad App
    • Now go back to “Manage Launchpad Spaces”.
    • You should be able to find and add your adapted app via its App ID or title.

Important Notes

  • You cannot directly select or expose the app in the Launchpad until it’s part of a business role (authorisation model in Public Cloud).
  • If you only deployed it but skipped the catalogue/role assignment, it will not appear in any launchpad config apps.

Helpful SAP Documentation:

  • SAP Help – Adapting SAP Fiori UIs (SAP S/4HANA Cloud)

Thank you and kind regards

Chuma

entry.title: Re: Vacation Post Challenge
entry.content: One of my favourite places to go in summer, is a small quiet medieval village in France, La Garde-Adhémar - a perfect place to just relax and chill.

entry.title: Re: Mapping error:Content is not allowed in prolog.
entry.content:
Hello everyone,
to solve the problem just add the XML prologue in the Content Modifier like this:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
${in.body}

I hope it is useful.
Best regards.
Emanuele

entry.title: 🎉 SAP CodeJam AI NYC After-Code – Drinks, Networking & AI Vibes!
entry.content:
📅 Date: Monday, June 23rd, 2025
🕔 Time: 5:00 PM – 7:30 PM
📍 Location: Peter Dillon's Pub, 130 E 40th St, New York, NY 10016  (6-min walk from CodeJam venue)

Dear SAP Community,

After an intense and inspiring day at the Getting started with Generative AI Hub on SAP AI Core, it's time to unwind, share insights, and connect on a more personal level. We're hosting an informal After-Jam meetup just a few blocks away at a classic Midtown pub — Peter Dillon!

Whether you want to chat about Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG), dive deeper into SAP AI Core, or just enjoy a cold drink and great company, this is the perfect setting.

🍻 Why join?

  • Recap the CodeJam with fellow attendees

  • Meet SAP experts, developers, and new faces

  • Raise a glass to Generative AI and community learning

  • No slides, no laptops — just relaxed conversation

There’s no formal agenda and no registration needed — just show up, grab a drink, and let’s toast to a day well spent!

Venue Notes:
Peter Dillon’s is a classic Irish pub with plenty of seating, affordable drinks, and a relaxed, no-frills atmosphere—perfect for casual conversations after a long day of coding. Pay-your-own tab.

We can’t wait to see you there and keep the energy from the CodeJam going into the evening. Bring a friend or two — the more the merrier!

Let’s keep building, learning, and growing — together.

Cheers,
The SAP NYC Community Team

entry.title: Re: AI in E-Commerce: Transforming Customer Journeys and Optimizing Business Efficiency
entry.content: I see it's been a while since you've posted, but I just wanted to ask if anyone here has actually integrated AI tools into their current e-commerce platform and seen measurable results in customer behavior or sales? I'm especially curious about how you're balancing personalization with data privacy concerns—feels like a tricky space right now.

entry.title: How can I navigate from customer line items (F0711) into the specific business partner of F3163?
entry.content:
Hello all,

I am wondering if it is possible to add a link into the "Manage Customer Line Items" app to the "Manage Business Partner Master Data" App  which jumps into the related business partner. In standard there are some links available for the semantic object "Customer" which let you jump into the specific customer directly (f.e. (F0046A) or (F0850A)) but not into the related business partner (F3163) directly out of customer line items app.

I managed to build a Launchpad Descriptor Item in the Fiori Launchpad App Manager which could let you jump into the Business Partner App. But unfortunately it does not jump into the specific Business Partner altough the CustomerID is part of the link. Do I have to maintain specific parameters in the Fiori Launchpad App Manager and if yes, which ones?

 

 

Thanks in advance and best regards!

entry.title: Re: CONNECT S4HANA TO TALLY
entry.content: You are talking about FI Accounting (ACDOCA) or Group Reporting (ACDOCU) as destination? If latter, please try to explore GRDC.

entry.title: OData-Service API_BUSINESS_PARTNER
entry.content:
Hallo,

für ein aktuelles Nebenprojekt haben wir uns für die Nutzung des SAP Standard OData-Services API_BUSINESS_PARTNER und in Kombination mit der SAP Eventing-Technologie (SAP Event Mesh) entschieden.
In unserem S/4HANA-Entwicklungssystem (Release 2023 / Support-Package Level 1) konnten wir von der Zahl her genau 8 BP-bezogene "Events" bzw. "Topic Identifier" festmachen, wovon nur 5 in die engere Auswahl geschafft haben.

Aber bei einer erweiterten Recherche über das Internet (ChatGPT) wurden uns weitere ca. 6 BP-bezogene "Events" bzw. "Topic Identifier" genannt, die in der Werteliste in unserem Entwicklungssystem nicht angeboten werden.

Beispiele:

- Business Partner Relationship Created 
- Business Partner Relationship Changed
- Business Partner Relationship Deleted
- Business Partner Address Created 
- Business Partner Address Changed
- Business Partner Address Deleted

Was könnte der mögliche Grund (etwas nicht aktiviert / falsches Release bzw. Support-Package Level ?) sein oder war die Antwort von ChatGPT inkorrekt (passiert auch gelegentlich) ?

Ein schnelles Feedback würde uns sehr helfen und würden uns natürlich auch darüber sehr freuen.

Herzlichen Dank im Voraus,

R. Saimun

entry.title: SAP CAP, HDI and Datasphere
entry.content:
Hello collegues,

For a customer we are developing a SAP CAP application with Hana capabilities. Before this project I have always used HDI container active on the same subaccount to connect CAP with Hana.

But now, we have two subaccounts:

  • Development: we develop SAPUI5 and CAP applications. HDI container service is not active.
  • Datasphere: we have the Datasphere service active and instance running.

We need to connect CAP application with Datasphere. I have asked to active HDI container service in Development subaccount but the manager rejected it.

So, my question is... is it possible to connect from CAP to Datasphere without HDI container in Development subaccount?

If the answer is yet, is it right to do and how can be achieved?

Thank you very much in advance Community!!!

BR,

Manuel

entry.title: What's new around our SAP Community Groups
entry.content:
It has been a while since our last update on our SAP Community Groups. 

Since our last update we have launched a new Integration group, and the Application Development and SAP Builders group were merged into the new Application Development and Automation group.  We have also started many new location groups, you can check them out to see if there is a group near you. 

We re-launched the Coffee Corner group, as the new Community Corner group. 
The Coffee Corner discussions are of course still alive, and we added a new blog post board to the group. Come join us there, the topics are not always necessarily work or community-related. @Marian_Zeis for instance recently shared how he built a raised bed with free barn wood 😊 

And sometimes, we have groups that for various different reasons need to be sunset. 
The following groups below will all be sunset as of June 30th, 2025: 
Career Corner

Galway
Kiel

SAP for Aerospace and Defense
SAP for Automotive
SAP for Banking
SAP for Chemicals
SAP for Consumer Products
SAP for Defense and Security
SAP for Healthcare
SAP for High Tech
SAP for Higher Education and Research
SAP for Insurance
SAP for Life Sciences
SAP for Media
SAP for Mill Products
SAP for Mining
SAP for Professional Services
SAP for Public Sector
SAP for Retail
SAP for Sports and Entertainment
SAP for Telecommunications
SAP for Travel and Transportation
SAP for Wholesale Distribution

The way the sunset process works, is that we will create a new read-only "Archived Content" area of the Community that we will move the entire group and its content to. This means that all the content of the inactive groups will still remain in the public community, and can be found both by search and by navigation. Sunsetting groups will therefore also not affect any community member's reputation, as all content you have published to any of the sunset groups will remain in your profile. 

The images below are from our test system, to give you an idea of what the Archived Content are of the Community will look like. 
New "Archived Content" area added to the navigation bar: 

Archived Groups will follow the same navigation pattern as the Groups area of the Community:  

Content will be marked as read-only: 

One of the most important aspects of this sunset process, is that it will allow us to be able to play more with the groups concept. We can start new groups, test concepts together with you, and see if they work. If the groups don't get the traction, or engagement, we had hoped for, we simply move them to the Archived Content area and move on to try something else instead. We are open for ideas 🙂

Unfortunately, there were a few issues with Joule for ABAP.  We're pleased to inform you that we've identified the root cause of this problem. A service request has been initiated internally and our team is actively working on implementing a fix.

We understand this issue has caused inconvenience, and we appreciate your patience.

Best regards

entry.title: Re: End-to-end Testing using Peppol Exchange in SAP Document and Reporting Compliance, Cloud Edition
entry.content:
Hi @monika_wolf ,

Thank you for providing us detailed explanation on 4 corner model for eDocument end to end flow. We are implementing eInvoicing for Belgium and facing this issue while transmitting edocument in SAP DRC Cloud / BTP. In S4 system when we are creating billing document edoc_cockpit is showing XML and when we are trying to submit it the status of this document is changed to "Received by Sender access point". This status for this document is hung and we are not able to proceed ahead for this document.

We have checked in DRC Cloud / BTP and we are getting status as below:

'

Even if in the 1st status shown as Failed to send document - There is no log available when clicked. Hence, we are struggling to understand what the exact issue is. We think that nothing is sent further at receiver end - either due to validation failure or due to some other issue.

If you or anyone are aware of this issue, request you to please let us know. Thanks in advance.

entry.title: #COE#RFL01 VAT refund XML file for Belgium
entry.content:
Hello,

In the EU and in certain conditions, a company can ask for a refund of VAT paid to another member of EU.

The conditions are explained in:

  •  Directive 2008/9/EC
  • Update with :  Implementing Regulation 79/2012

Each country has a portal to declare invoice and VAT to refund.

I actually work for a Belgian company and Belgium use portal “Intervat”.
https://finance.belgium.be/en/taxpayers-established-in-belgium-foreign-vat-refund

In Intervat there are two ways to declare a refund:

  • Populate it manually
  • Upload an xml file

Xml file structured is explained with an XSD file “NewVatRefund-in_v0_9.xsd”
https://finances.belgium.be/fr/E-services/Intervat/documentation-technique

I searched for a way in SAP to generate this XML, but I am not sure that SAP is compliant.

I always look at some customizing points and apps.

SCCUI 103491 is used to declare Tax code to refund.

To add information of “expense” code we can use SCCUI 103490 or 103492.

App “VAT refund (UE)” create an overview of the FI documents that are relevant to VAT refund. Select “Create Reporting Portfolio” allowed to use app “Prepare Electronic Tax return”.

And in app “Prepare Electronic Tax Return” we can select a return type “0003 – VAT refund” and, for me, that should permit to create the XML file that Intervat need.

Do we agree or not ?

If SAP is not compliant, there is another way in SAP Public Cloud (2-landsape) to generate this XML file ?

Best regards,

Teddy.

#COE#RFL01

entry.title: Re: Update on SAP Community Groups
entry.content:
Thank you for mentioning my post 🙂

You mentioned that those post will be read-only. Is it still possible to comment as i might have a question about the content or should you rather contact the author privately?

entry.title: Re: How to Add a Release Approval Group for a Supplier

entry.title: Re: Subcontracting value should be added in material pric...
entry.content:
Hi @kranti_babhulkar,

as @Chuma said, what you are describing should be possible, as long as you have different material numbers for the purchased material and the material which you provide to your subcontractor.

The process would look like this:

Subcontracting info record for the procured material (SG23) with service charges of 1.90 EUR per piece:

Bill of Material for SG23 with materials to be provided to the subcontractor:

Cost estimate of the procured material (SG23) including service charge and material costs:

This results in a standard price of 315 EUR per 100 pieces.

Subcontracting purchase order with service charge of 1.90 EUR per piece according to purchase info record:

Transfer posting to subcontracting stock:

 

Goods receipt of SG23 with consumption of provided materials:

 

Resulting accounting document with the value of 315 EUR for 100 procured pieces:

If you want to use the same material number to provide it to the subcontractor and to procure from the subcontractor just differentiating by valuation type/batch, I'm afraid this is not possible.

If you have any additional questions, feel free to ask.

Best regards
Marvin Fuehrer

entry.title: How to retrieve (in a report) the Inspection Unit Number?
entry.content:
Hello everyone

Need your support to try to find a way to create a report or if there is any t-code available that would give me the information of inspection lot, PN and the Inspection Unit Number.

Our inspection plans are single results recording and we use this field to input the individual identified for the part inspected at IQC (please see the picture from QE51N). Are there any ways to retrieve this information somehow?

entry.title: Re: Understand Tech Behind SAP Business Data Cloud (BDC) - Out of the box 'Intelligent Applications&&
entry.content:
Hey @VenuGaddam , 

I have two questions I would like to ask:

 

  1. With the introduction of SAP Business Data Cloud (BDC), does this mean that SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC) is planned to be retired in the long term as a stand-alone system and will only be accessible via BDC or will the two solutions co-exist?

  2. My second question is about data access. Is it possible to connect BDC with a custom database from custom applications hosted on SAP BTP and map the data to the Insight Apps in BDC? Or does the integration only work with SAP systems?


Thanks 
Samuel

entry.title: Re: SAP BTP Learning
entry.content:
Hi @ScoutMaster_59 
Please check SAP CERTIFICATION C_BCBTP SAP Certified Associate - Positioning SAP Business Technology Platform as part of SAP Business Suite site where you find the under the How to prepare tab the recommended SAP LEARNING JOURNEY. 
By the end of this learning journey, you will be able to effectively position SAP Business Technology Platform by applying SAP’s "AI-First, Suite-First" strategy, emphasizing solution and industry-specific value propositions. You will gain the ability to link SAP solutions to key challenges and demonstrate their impact through real-world use cases.
With this learning journey, you will be fully prepared to achieve certification in positioning SAP Business Technology Platform as part of SAP Business Suite.
Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: Re: Dump CONVT_NO_NUMBER due to 3405744
entry.content:
Did you alread raise an issue to support ?

  • Every other check use value in quote in the function group

entry.title: Soon to be retried: C_HRHFC - Implementation Consultant - SAP SuccessFactors Full Cloud/Core Hybrid
entry.content:
Hello,

Please be informed of the upcoming retirement of our certification C_HRHFC - Implementation Consultant - SAP SuccessFactors Full Cloud/Core Hybrid. SAP Certified Associate: It will be retire it by June 30, 2025.
The learning content materials is still available on help pages on SAP Learning Hub until SAP Learning Hub  shutdown.
All learners impacted by this retirement will receive an additional 12-month validity from the retirement date until their certification loses its validity. That means all certificates valid on June 30, 2025, automatically stay valid until the end of June 2026 without needing a stay certified assessment.
The recommended alternative is HRH98 Integrating SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central with SAP HCM for SAP S/4HANA which leads only to a completion badge.
The expired certificates will remain in the learner's history linked to your SAP Universal ID.

Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: Re: How to do background scheduling with clean core, including Fiori apps, replacing se38 reports
entry.content:
Hi @Ramjee_korada 

If you use the application job framework, you yourself cannot write the job log, that is taken care of by the application job framework.

The application log can be used, as I've shown in my example. But no, the log feature is not for "saving columns for an ALV list". You can use MESSAGE functionality, EXCEPTIONS, or free text (as I have) in order to fill the application log. Consider the screenshot I have shared of the log. Looks pretty neat to me and I can write as many as I like.

entry.title: Customers Payment API https://api.sap.com/api/ccpcustpayment/overview
entry.content:
Dear Team 

We are trying to post incoming customer payments via API which should also clear the customer invoices. 

Has someone used this API, can this be used for this requirement. 

https://api.sap.com/api/ccpcustpayment/overview
 
We have already explored the other journalentry APIs, it does he work but there has to be two API calls, 1 for payment and second for clearing but due to a already very high transactions volume we dont want to post two documents

entry.title: Re: How to create a Dropdown List Variable to prefilter a...
entry.content: Does this generation have to be done within SAPB1 prior to making the query, or would the UDT's generation stay within the bounds of the query itself?

entry.title: Re: SuccessFactors Fun quick tip: Adding HTML code to your Message Definition and Alerts and reduce

We are using some html in EC Global Benefits and it works great.  But with the new "benefits experience" upgrade, the html no longer works.  Any ideas?

entry.title: Webinar: Enterprise Architecture Education | Modern Approaches with SAP LeanIX
entry.content:
Join us for our upcoming webinar, Enterprise Architecture Education: Modern Approaches with SAP LeanIX, which is part of the SAP University Alliances 2025 Webinar Series

About: Digital transformation is reshaping how companies operate, and Enterprise Architecture is vital for aligning business goals with innovative IT strategies. If you want to discover how a modern approach to EA can help organizations thrive—and see how these principles are being incorporated into academic courses—don’t miss our webinar: Enterprise Architecture Education – Modern Approaches with SAP LeanIX, happening on May 14, 2025. We’ll explore how SAP LeanIX, a leading Enterprise Architecture tool, is used in academic programs to prepare students for real-world IT challenges.

Speakers: Professor João Rebelo Moreira will share his firsthand experience of integrating SAP LeanIX into his Architecture of Information Systems course, providing valuable insights into bridging the gap between theory and practice.

Audience: This webinar is open to all professors and students. Feel free to share the invitation with colleagues whom you believe would enjoy joining!

Save your spot, register now: Webinar Registration - Zoom

Learn more about LeanIX Academic Edition: https://www.leanix.net/en/enterprise-architecture/academic-edition

entry.title: Re: How to create a Dropdown List Variable to prefilter a...
entry.content:
Hi Jacob,

an UDT is a User-Defined-Table which can be added in SAP It can be supplemented with UDF'S (User-Defined-Fields as Columns).

If you don't know how to use or to find them you should ask your consultant, otherwise a lot can go wrong or you force the whole company to a new login, loosing everthing they have done until then.

regards Lothar

entry.title: Re: Configuring Custom MDF objects for reportability using Story reports.
entry.content:
Thanks.

I followed the steps above and assigned the sub schema in the object (Under Object configuration) and the schema and objects appear in the Story report

Manish

entry.title: ewm-qm integration stock type problem
entry.content:
Hello,
In the EWM-QM integration process, during goods receipt for the same material and batch, the stock is expected to be posted with quality inspection (Q) status. However, we have observed that in some instances the stock is correctly posted with Q status, while in other cases under conditions we have not yet identified it is posted with unrestricted-use (F) status instead.
Could you please advise on the possible root causes of this behavior?

entry.content: I wonder if anyone outside Brazil has heard of Serra da Canastra in the state of Minas Gerais, it is absolutely stunning with its many waterfalls and hiking opportunities in nature that doesnt seem to end, and on top of that you get the super delicious food of Minas.

entry.title: Splitting operations duration when scheduling planned orders
entry.content:
Hello PP Gurus,

I have two individual capacities for a work center, for which I want to split my production capacity requirement when scheduling.

I set the number of capacities at work center master data, ticked the option "required splitting"  and defined the number of splits as two.

Even though the duration of my planned order are not splitted over the two planned orders.

could you please tell me what's could be the problem?

entry.title: Impact of Microsoft’s VBScript Retirement on SAP GUI Scripting via sapfewse.ocx (Excel VBA).
entry.content:
SAP Note 3484031 (“Anstehende Deaktivierung von VBScript durch Microsoft – Auswirkungen auf SAP GUI Scripting”) states that classic VBScript-based automation scenarios will cease to work once Microsoft removes the VBScript engine from Windows.

In our environment we automate SAP GUI exclusively through Excel VBA macros that reference the SAP GUI Scripting COM library (sapfewse.ocx). To the best of our knowledge this approach executes inside the VBA runtime only and does not instantiate the VBScript engine (vbscript.dll) directly.

Could SAP (or anyone who has already tested) clarify:

  1. Does the sapfewse.ocx scripting interface contain any internal dependency on the VBScript engine, such that VBA-driven automations will break once VBScript is disabled/removed?
  2. If a dependency exists, is SAP planning an updated version of the SAP GUI Scripting API that eliminates it, or do we need to migrate to an alternative approach (e.g., PowerShell or JScript)?
  3. Are there recommended test procedures or timelines we should follow to verify the resilience of existing VBA macros before Microsoft’s final VBScript removal phase?

Any official guidance or field experience would be greatly appreciated.

entry.title: Re: CORUPROC transaction not clearing AFFW data
entry.content:
Hello

This issue typically happens when you are posting goods movements for order confirmations and report CORUPROC is executed in parallel. You can use the parameter 'Time Offset in Seconds' in report CORUPROC to make sure that it will only process records created after a few seconds and avoid this issue. 
SAP Note 2519125 introduced this parameter and provides more information about the issue.

Regards,
Caetano

entry.title: Situation Handling - autoclose of situations
entry.content:
Hi, 

I am using the situation handling extended framework to set up notifications. I want the batch job to re-visit all open situations and update the notification with the current status (update the text on the notification). I also want the situations to be auto-closed if they no longer fulfill the trigger requirements. Is there any setting to define this behavior? Using SAP Public cloud.

Thank you!

entry.title: SAP BTP Subaccount Access to Users
entry.content:
Dear Support,

 

Kindly help us how we can provide access of Subaccount to Users. As the users have to deploy the applications on SAP BTP subaccount. Kindly guide us how we can achieve the same.

 

Thanks & Regards


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: SAP BTP Subaccount Access to Users
entry.content:
Hi,

To provide access of Subaccount to Users please follow these steps:

You must be a subaccount administrator to add other subaccount members and the users exist in a trusted identity provider.

Assign role collections see below : Assign Users to Role Collections

  1. Open the SAP BTP cockpit.
  2. Go to your global account or subaccount
  3. Choose Security  Role Collections.
  4. Choose the role collection to which you want to assign users.
  5. Go to the Users section and choose Edit.
  6. Enter the user ID, identity provider, and e-mail address of the user that you want to assign to the role collection.
  7. (Optional) To add more users, choose  (Add a user).

Additionally you can find information here how to deploy Applications in Cloud Foundry : https://help.sap.com/docs/BTP/65de2977205c403bbc107264b8eccf4b/09fdb9bdc6804c479d634297f1d07e09.html

 

Best Regards,

Reka

entry.title: Start scheduling for the SO maintenance plan.
entry.content:
How can the SO maintenance plan be started automatically?

Hello everyone,

The maintenance plan with the type ‘SO’ has been set up and can also be started manually.

As expected, a service order is created.

The start day was set 3 days ago and in the scheduling list the days are also marked with the planned execution, but the task is not executed. The task remains untouched and no order is created.

From the PM I know the report RISTRA20 which has to be started as a job.

However, since transaction IP10 does not process ‘SO’ maintenance plans, this does not seem to be the right way.

Which report must be used for the SO maintenace plan or what is the procedure in S/4HANA Server?

 

Thank you very much

entry.title: Re: What's new around our SAP Community Groups
entry.content:
@Marian_Zeis - you are welcome, reading your post made me wish I had a garden 😊

It will not be possible to comment on read-only content. 
If you find relevant content you want to comment on in the Archived Content area, I suggest we get the author's permission to move the post to a category or board, making it writable again.

entry.title: Tutorials no longer open
entry.content: No matter which browser, the individual tutorials no longer open.

entry.title: How to logout in SAP BTP SDK for android V5.1.2
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am using SAP BTP SDK for android version 5.1.2
I have logged in with user A. And I have logged out and cleared data as below.

secureKeyValueStore.deleteStore(AndroidSystem.getContext())
offlineODataProvider.clear()

And again logged in with user B. But it is showing user A data.
How to clear the user A data completely If I login like below
okHttpClient = new OkHttpClient.Builder().addInterceptor(new AppHeadersInterceptor(appID, deviceID, appVersion))
.authenticator(new CustomBasicAuthAuthenticator(username, password, bapStore))
.cookieJar(new WebkitCookieJar())
.retryOnConnectionFailure(true)
.build();
SettingsParameters settingsParameters = new SettingsParameters(serviceURL, appID, deviceID, appVersion);
SettingsProvider.set(settingsParameters);
ClientProvider.set(okHttpClient); Request request = new Request.Builder().get().url(serviceURL + "odata/applications/v4/" + appID).build();

How to clear the pervious session and clear the data properly?

entry.title: Customization on S4HANA 2022 for 1099 statutory report ( NEC and MISC),
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

 

I have customized the S/4HANA 1099 statutory report for both NEC and MISC forms. However, when I run the report using the "Run Statutory Reports" app, the 1099 MISC form displays in the incorrect format—it shows as a 1099 NEC IRS form instead. For the withholding tax configuration for the 1099 MISC, I am using WHT Type: FE and WHT Code: 14. Could anyone help to resolve this issue? Thank you!

I am unable to change the yearly 1099 report settings, so the system generates a monthly report instead.

I appreciate your help.

entry.title: Re: CONNECT S4HANA TO TALLY

entry.title: Re: Save public variants in apps
entry.content:
Hello,

Thank you very much for your question.

Is this the information you're looking for?

View and Bookmarks

"As an administrator, you can share your own views and bookmarks and make them available to one or more users. And you can also share views created by other users. To be able to do so, you need to have the SAP_CORE_BC_UI_SHARE_PC (User Interface - View Sharing) business catalog assigned to your role."

Kind regards,

Henrike

entry.title: Re: Vacation Post Challenge
entry.content: My wife and I in DEC 2023 at the Pico Island Volcano, Azores, Portugal. An incredible experience about volcanoes and the simplicity of life on this island.

entry.title: Re: uploading routing long text with LSMW object 0170 and...
entry.content:
Hi,

In the TXT_OBJ_DS you have to assign your operations structure/file, and in the TLINE_DS you have to assign your long text structure/file. The structure of the long text must be a lower level of the operations one. The key between the operation and long text file can be MATNR, WERKS_D, PLNAL, PLNFOLGE and VORNR. (You will not find all those fields in the TLINE_DS, but you can use them in your file. This is how SAP can define a key between the files).

1 step: maintain the source structures - long text structure in the lower level of the operations.

2 step: maintain the source fields - both  routing and long text structures must have the key fields informed above.

3 step: assign the operations structure to the TXT_OBJ_DS and assign the long text structure to the TLINE_DS.

4 step: Field mapping and conversion rules - review the fields of TXT_OBJ_DS. I'm using like this:

BEGIN_OF_RECORD: TXT_OBJ_DS = INIT_TXT_OBJ_DS.
RECTY: TXT_OBJ_DS-RECTY = '21'.

ACTTYP: TXT_OBJ_DS-ACTTYP = 'H'.

OBJ:TXT_OBJ_DS-OBJ = 'O'.

PLNAL: TXT_OBJ_DS-PLNAL = '1'.      (This is the Group Counter, in my case is always 1).

PLNFL: TXT_OBJ_DS-PLNFL = routing_op-plnfolge.      (routing_op is the name of my structure)

VORNR: TXT_OBJ_DS-VORNR = routing_op-vornr.

TEXT_FROM: TXT_OBJ_DS-TEXT_FROM = 1.

TEXT_TO:  TXT_OBJ_DS-TEXT_TO = '99'.

Review the fields of TLINE_DS. I'm using like this:

_BEGIN_OF_RECORD_:  TLINE_DS = INIT_TLINE_DS.

RECTY: TLINE_DS-RECTY = '22'.

TDFORMAT: TLINE_DS-TDFORMAT = '*'.           (* = this is a paragraph)

TDLINE:  TLINE_DS-TDLINE = OPLONGTEXT-LTXT.        (OPLONGTEXT is the name of my structure)

entry.title: Re: Discover the Fresh New Design of SAP Help Portal
entry.content:
Will my existing bookmarks work or do i have to rediscover them?

Thank you

entry.title: Generate .xsodata service from .hdbview
entry.content:
I'm on an old HANA system. I need to select data from a table, filtering them and exposing through an .xsodata service. Reading online I got that I need to create an .hdbview view and use it in my .xsodata service. So, my stations.hdbview it's:

schema="SAP_NTV_OPINTSYS";
query="SELECT \"STATIONCODE\" \"NAME\" FROM \"SAP_NTV_OPINTSYS\".\"NAV_STATION\" WHERE \"COUNTRYCODE\" = 'IT' AND \"INACTIVE\" = '0' AND \"STATIONCLASS\" = 'T' ";

and I think it's correct because it shows as activated.

The .xsodata I'm writing it's this:

service {
    "<path_to_the_hdbview>::stations" as "stations" keys ("STATIONCODE", "NAME");
}

but I can't activate it, there is some sort of error I don't get.

Is this the correct syntax?

entry.title: Re: Integrating ECC with S/4HANA
entry.content: For transfer of stock, consider sending/receiving IDocs for transfer orders, deliveries and movements, with IDOcs such as ORDERS, DESADV and MBGMCR.

entry.title: Re: 关于“工艺路线”导入模板无“报废”字段如何解决
entry.content:
Machine translation:
How to Resolve Without Scrap Field for Routing Import Template

As shown in the figure, in HANA PUBLIC CLOUD, you need to fill in the Scrapping field (Japanese version called bad) (scrap) when you create a routing, there is no field in the import template, and it cannot be updated after the data is moved, is there a good solution?

entry.title: Re: IDOC xsd import giving error in message mapping in SA...
entry.content: It did not allow me to upload the xsd as .txt and gave error so i uploaded it with ext .xml which needs to be changed to .txt or .xsd when you check. Sorry about that

entry.title: Re: Step-by-Step Guide to Setting Up Custom Fields in Work Center Formula Parameters
entry.content: Thank you for sharing

entry.title: Re: XPath expression
entry.content:
This should help

 

https://www.data2type.de/en/xml-xslt-xslfo/xslt/xslt-xpath-function-reference/alphabetical-xslt-and-xpath-reference/current-date

 

Example 1 - date with timezone in the function context:

fn:current-date() returns: 2007-07-10+12:00.

If a date value with timezone indication applies in the context of the function call, this value is returned. Here, a timezone indication in the form +12 hours compared to UTC time is included.

Example 2 - date without timezone in the function context:

fn:current-date() returns: 2007-07-10.

If a date value without timezone is valid in the context of the function call, the mere date value is returned. Here – in contrast to xs:dateTime indications – no Z is attached to the value (see fn:current-dateTime(), example 2).
